# Research: Mockup tools for the design phase (2026-06)

## Conclusion

**Recommended combination: self-contained HTML mockups generated by Claude Code (an automatable pipeline) + Claude Design (optional, for manual visual exploration), on top of a shadcn/ui design system + tokens as a guardrail.**

## Key findings

### Claude Design (Anthropic Labs, April 2026)
- Visual design tool in claude.ai: prompts → interactive HTML/CSS/JS prototypes. Included with Pro/Max at no extra cost (a separate quota from chat and from Claude Code).
- It has **direct handoff to Claude Code**: it exports a bundle with `design.html`, screenshots, `design-notes.md` and a component spec with design tokens.
- **Key limitation: no API or MCP** — it's browser-only, it can't be automated from the pipeline. Research preview, consumes a lot of quota.
- Role in the factory: an optional manual tool for when the owner wants to explore visually; the exported bundle enters the pipeline as an artifact.
- [Announcement](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-design-anthropic-labs) · [Handoff mechanics](https://claudefa.st/blog/guide/mechanics/claude-design-handoff)

### HTML mockups generated by Claude Code (the automatable path)
Consolidated community pattern:
1. `DESIGN.md` + `design-tokens.json` as the project contract (color/typography/spacing tokens, component inventory, prohibitions).
2. The agent generates **3 design directions in parallel** as self-contained, navigable `.html` files (inline CSS/JS, responsive).
3. Playwright takes screenshots per viewport (375px/1280px) and axe-core runs an accessibility check → `a11y-report.md`.
4. **Human gate**: The owner opens the 3 HTML files in the browser and picks one (or asks to iterate). A one-word reply.
5. The contract is frozen: final `design-tokens.json` + `design-decisions.md`. The implementation can only use tokens, never hardcoded values.

### Design guardrails (they compensate for the UX/UI weakness)
- **shadcn/ui CLI v4 + shadcn/skills** (March 2026): an official skill for agents that reduces hallucinations; **Presets** package a complete theme into a string (`npx shadcn init --preset CODE`).
- **tweakcn**: a visual editor for shadcn themes → exports Tailwind variables + versionable JSON = our `design-tokens.json`. [tweakcn](https://tweakcn.com/)
- **Design reviewer agent**: Playwright MCP (render + multi-viewport screenshots) + `@axe-core/playwright` (WCAG 2.2) as an automatic gate BEFORE the owner looks.

### External tools evaluated
| Tool | API? | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| v0 Platform API (Vercel) | Yes (REST, beta, ~$1-4/generation) | Optional future: complex components (tables, charts) |
| Magic Patterns | Yes (REST) | Alternative to v0, hosted URL to review |
| Lovable / Bolt.new | No | Discard: interactive, credit model |
| Figma Make + MCP | Read MCP | Only if previous Figma designs existed — not the case |

## Standard artifacts of the design phase

```
docs/design/
├── mockups/direction-{1,2,3}.html      # navigable, self-contained
├── mockups/screenshots/*.png           # per viewport
├── mockups/a11y-report.md              # axe-core
├── design-tokens.json                  # single source (tweakcn/extracted)
└── design-decisions.md             # chosen direction and rationale
DESIGN.md                               # project design system
```

Additional sources: [Design-to-code workflow](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide/blob/main/guide/workflows/design-to-code.md) · [DESIGN.md convention](https://dudarik.com/en/blog/claude-code-ai-design-mcp/) · [shadcn 2026](https://medium.com/@nakranirakesh/shadcn-ui-march-2026-update-cli-v4-ai-agent-skills-and-design-system-presets-d30cf200b0e9) · [axe + Claude Code](https://claudecodeguides.com/claude-code-axe-accessibility-testing-guide/)
